title: Talkspace - Online Therapy and Mental Health Platform
problem: Access to mental health therapy is limited by cost, availability, and stigma. Traditional therapy requires in-person visits.
solution: Digital therapy platform offering text, video, and audio therapy sessions with licensed therapists. Also provides psychiatric services.
regulatory_notes: Licensed therapists and psychiatrists in each market.
varden_fit: Moderate — mental health telemedicine. Could integrate with Varden's mental health provider network.
notes: Mental health teletherapy leader. European expansion ongoing.
